facial_structure_and_positioning.bone_structure: <string: e.g., high cheekbones, strong jawline, prominent brow bone>
facial_structure_and_positioning.three_dimensional_depth: <string: e.g., deep-set eyes, flat midface, prominent projection>
facial_structure_and_positioning.feature_specific_lighting_interaction: <string: e.g., Rembrandt light triangle on far cheek, butterfly shadow under nose, contour shadows in hollows>

micro_details: <string: pores, peach fuzz, subtle freckles, micro-wrinkles>
skin_texture.subsurface_scattering: <string: skin translucency and light bleeding, especially on cartilage/ears>

nose_and_nasal_structure.highlight_and_specular: <string: thin continuous highlight down the bridge, tip specular reflection>
nose_and_nasal_structure.shadow_cast: <string: direction, length, and softness of the shadow cast by the nose>

mouth_and_lips.spatial_relationship: <string: distance to nose (philtrum length), lip fullness ratio>
mouth_and_lips.lip_lighting: <string: specular highlight on cupid's bow, deep shadow under lower lip>

ears_and_jawline.ear_position_and_lighting: <string: flush/protruding, intense subsurface scattering on helix rim>
ears_and_jawline.jaw_contour_shadow: <string: hard definition vs soft roll-off into the neck, reflected light from collar>

hair_dynamics.styling_products_effect: <string: wet look, matte pomade, natural oil>

garment_1.fabric_micro_texture: <string: e.g., 200-thread count cotton, raw selvedge denim>

lens_flaws: <string: chromatic aberration, halation, lens flare, vignetting>
